old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.35.5","title":"Adapt link migration callers atomically","description":"Review of 2auf.35 found unchanged Rust KISS code still emits four-byte MICs for unsigned frames and both Zephyr L2 implementations reject newly valid 5-8 byte unsigned frames. Audit and minimally adapt all direct frame callers, including Puck beacon emission if required, so the wire migration can land without knowingly breaking workspace or firmware behavior.","acceptance_criteria":"Rust KISS tests pass with zero-MIC unsigned frames; both Zephyr L2 paths admit the new fixed-header minimum; Puck and direct callers emit valid migrated frames; focused workspace/firmware tests and three reviews pass.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-16T23:23:31.333888Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-16T23:23:31.333888Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.35.5","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.35","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-16T23:23:31.485011Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.35.5","title":"Adapt link migration callers atomically","description":"Review of 2auf.35 found unchanged Rust KISS code still emits four-byte MICs for unsigned frames and both Zephyr L2 implementations reject newly valid 5-8 byte unsigned frames. Audit and minimally adapt all direct frame callers, including Puck beacon emission if required, so the wire migration can land without knowingly breaking workspace or firmware behavior.","acceptance_criteria":"Rust KISS tests pass with zero-MIC unsigned frames; both Zephyr L2 paths admit the new fixed-header minimum; Puck and direct callers emit valid migrated frames; focused workspace/firmware tests and three reviews pass.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"Mark Atwood","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-16T23:23:31.333888Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-17T15:52:18.484791Z","started_at":"2026-07-17T15:52:18.484791Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-17T15:57:18.484791Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-17T15:52:18.484791Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.35.5","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.35","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-16T23:23:31.485011Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
new_value: {"notes":"Caller migration implemented: Rust KISS emits zero-MIC unsigned frames and enforces 255-byte LoRa ingress/egress; both Zephyr L2 copies use authoritative 5-byte fixed header; Puck emits 5-byte unsigned beacon with LENGTH=4; observational L2 beacon exception migrated; retained MIC sizing helpers/constants and stale CRC/AES docs removed; three Rust firmware queues reject instead of truncating \u003e255 bytes; C KISS raw port rejects \u003e255 RX/TX while AX.25 retains 1024; vector/docs selector terminology updated. Gates passed: Rust lichen-link 34 unit + 2 shared vectors + 1 doc; lichen-kiss all-features 58 unit + 5 doc; clippy -D warnings; Python focused 224 passed/10 environment skips; fail-closed Python-Rust interop 2/2; C frame and Schnorr CTest 1/1 each; Ruff; deterministic vector regeneration; git diff --check; three final independent reviews no findings. Remaining required firmware builds are blocked by expired AWS session requiring interactive 'aws login'; local Zephyr and Docker unavailable."}
